pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target compatibility from version 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern framework features.
Introduce the JHipster dependency management BOM to centralize version control for the ecosystem.
Remove explicit Dropwizard Metrics dependencies in favor of Spring Boot Actuator's built-in metrics support.
Upgrade Hibernate from version 4 to 5 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 2.x and Java 11.
Switch Jackson Hibernate module from hibernate4 to hibernate5 to match the upgraded Hibernate version.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype module to support Java 8+ Date/Time API serialization, replacing Joda-Time.
Remove Joda-Time dependencies as the project migrates to the standard Java 8+ Date/Time API.
Upgrade Springfox to support OpenAPI 3.0 (springfox-oas) alongside Swagger 2 for modern API documentation.
Replace the legacy commons-lang 2.x with commons-lang3 to align with modern library standards.
Introduce Testcontainers for MySQL to enable robust integration testing with real database instances.
Switch from Ehcache 2.x (hibernate-ehcache) to JCache compliant Ehcache 3.x (hibernate-jcache).
Update MapStruct to a newer version and explicitly include the annotation processor for compilation.
Upgrade Liquibase to version 4.x to support newer database features and fix regressions.
Explicitly add javax.annotation-api dependency which was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR to align with Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Remove deprecated Spring Security OAuth 2.0 legacy dependency.
Add Spring Boot OAuth 2.0 Client starter for modern OAuth support.
Add Spring Boot OAuth 2.0 Resource Server starter for modern OAuth support.
Remove legacy Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies.
Remove deprecated Spark metrics reporter.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for modern metrics.
Add Dropwizard metrics core dependency.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 API for architecture testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 Engine for architecture testing.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for standard error handling.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency.
Add Spring Security Test dependency.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine from Spring Boot Starter Test to enforce JUnit 5.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
Add JIB Maven plugin for container image building.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 and modern dependencies.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed liquibase-hibernate4 to liquibase-hibernate5 and updated dependencies

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle plugin with specific configuration.
Add Javadoc plugin configuration.
Add Failsafe plugin for integration tests.
Add IDEA plugin configuration.
Add Resources plugin configuration.
Add Properties Maven plugin for reading project properties.
Add Git Commit ID plugin for build metadata.
Update JaCoCo plugin to support separate unit and integration test coverage.
Update Enforcer plugin to require Java 8-15 and Maven version.
Remove SortPom plugin.
Remove Gatling Maven plugin.
Remove Eclipse plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Remove Enforcer plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Remove Surefire plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Remove WAR plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Remove JaCoCo plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Remove Sonar Maven plugin from main plugins section.
Remove MapStruct processor plugin configuration.
Remove Liquibase plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Remove Spring Boot Maven plugin configuration from main plugins section.
Change pom.xml file mode from executable to regular file.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to enforce alphabetical test execution order and exclude integration tests from the unit test phase.
Configure maven-failsafe-plugin to run integration tests (classes ending in IT or IntTest) with alphabetical ordering.
Add sonar-maven-plugin to the build plugins for code quality analysis.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin to repackage the application and set the main class.
Add a 'no-liquibase' profile to allow disabling Liquibase migrations via Spring profiles.
Add an 'api-docs' profile to enable API documentation generation via Spring profiles.
Add a 'tls' profile to enable TLS configuration via Spring profiles.
Add a 'webpack' profile to manage frontend build using frontend-maven-plugin and H2 database.
Update the 'dev' profile to include Undertow, DevTools, H2, and composite Spring profiles.
Switch the 'prod' profile embedded server from Tomcat to Undertow.
Remove the deprecated yeoman-maven-plugin from the build process.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to the 'dev' profile to install Node/NPM and run Webpack builds.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to the 'prod' profile to install Node/NPM and run production Webpack builds.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to the 'prod' profile to generate build information.
Add a 'war' profile to enable WAR packaging using maven-war-plugin.
Add an 'IDE' profile to include annotation processors for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator.
Add an 'eclipse' profile to configure m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore specific plugin executions.
Add an 'e2e' profile for end-to-end testing configuration.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to apply specific indentation rules to frontend and config files while keeping general settings.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent_style/size to global scope and added specific block for [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] with indent_size = 2

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple `* text eol=lf` and specific binary lists with `* text=auto` and extensive categorized lists for text, binary, documents, and configs.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the generated main CSS file to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore static resources copied to the target classes directory during build.
Ignore JavaScript test coverage reports generated by the build process.
Ignore Node.js temporary directories and debug logs.
Ignore Webpack and cache loader directories to keep the repository clean.
Ignore Spring Tool Suite 4 specific cache directories.
Ignore IntelliJ IDEA compiled output directories.
Ignore Visual Studio Code configuration and workspace files.
Ignore the Gradle build output directory.
Ensure the Maven Wrapper JAR is tracked by negating the ignore rule.
Ignore the ESLint cache file to improve linting performance.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Remove the explicit javaVersion configuration as JHipster 7 defaults to Java 11 and no longer requires this field for standard setups.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to native JSON booleans for consistency with newer JHipster versions.
Update the base name and package structure to reflect the new sample application identity.
Add explicit frontend configuration options such as client framework and package manager to the generator config.
Specify test frameworks in the configuration to ensure proper generation of test infrastructure.
Explicitly define the cache provider and hibernate cache settings in the new configuration format.
Explicitly declare the application type as monolith in the generator configuration.
Add skip flags for client, server, and user management to control generation behavior.
Define language and translation settings explicitly in the configuration.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the specific JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation including OAuth2 setup instructions.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation text.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, and angularjs deps; added @angular/core, @angular/cli, and webpack.

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing infrastructure with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; added jest, protractor, @angular-builders/jest.

package.json.general_idea: Introduce ESLint and Prettier for code quality and formatting, replacing older JSHint setups.
package.json.human_impl: Added eslint, prettier, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, and husky for pre-commit hooks.

package.json.general_idea: Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands (ng build, ng serve) and Maven wrapper instead of Grunt tasks.
package.json.human_impl: Changed "test": "grunt test" to "test": "ng test..." and added webpack:prod scripts.

package.json.general_idea: Add npm scripts to manage Docker containers for databases and Keycloak, facilitating local development and CI.
package.json.human_impl: Added docker:db:up, docker:keycloak:up, and related teardown scripts.

package.json.general_idea: Update package name, version, and description to reflect the specific OAuth2 sample application identity.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the embedded H2 database identifier to match the specific application name.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' and jdbc url to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and 'jhipsteroauth2sampleapplication'

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for cache, CORS, mail, and logging to align with the framework's standard structure.
Switch from generic DataSourceClassName to HikariDataSource type and update H2 connection URL and credentials for better connection pooling and security.
Update the JPA database platform property to use the JHipster-specific FixedH2Dialect instead of the generic H2 dialect.
Enable Spring Boot DevTools for faster development cycles with automatic restarts and livereload exclusions.
Configure detailed logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and application packages to aid in debugging during development.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Include the 'api-docs' profile in the active profiles to enable Swagger/OpenAPI documentation generation in the dev environment.
Update Liquibase contexts to include 'faker' for loading sample data automatically during development.
Configure local mail server properties for development environment testing.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing XHTML mode and keeping cache disabled for development.
Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark, Graphite) as it is no longer used or supported in the new JHipster version.
Migrate cache configuration from generic properties to JHipster-specific Ehcache settings under the jhipster namespace.
Configure CORS settings to allow browser access to the API during development, particularly for BrowserSync integration.
Add Logstash configuration properties for forwarding logs, though disabled by default in dev profile.
Add configuration to control JSON format logging, disabled by default for readability in dev environment.
Explicitly disable H2 console in dev profile for security reasons.
Configure Jackson to indent output for better readability of JSON responses in development.
Update message cache duration to use ISO 8601 format for better standardization.
Configure HikariCP connection pool settings with specific pool name and auto-commit behavior.
Add JHipster-specific mail base URL configuration for generating links in emails.
Add placeholder section for application-specific properties to encourage type-safe configuration.
Add comprehensive comments explaining configuration sections and providing links to documentation.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Switched from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool for better performance and compatibility with modern Spring Boot.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.type to com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource and removed dataSourceClassName.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated Hibernate dialect to support newer MySQL versions and removed deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed explicit database-platform and naming-strategy, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replaced deprecated EhCache 2.x region factory with standard Spring Cache abstraction compatible with JDK 11.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed hibernate.cache.region.factory_class and moved cache config to jhipster.cache.ehcache.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replaced legacy Dropwizard metrics with Micrometer for JDK 11 compatibility and modern monitoring.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed metrics.spark/graphite config and added management.metrics.export.prometheus.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Standardized logging configuration to use Spring Boot's native logging levels instead of custom filters.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added logging.level.ROOT and specific package levels, removing custom logging beans.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enabled HTTP response compression for improved performance in production.
Configured graceful shutdown to ensure clean termination of requests during deployment.
Explicitly disabled Spring Boot DevTools in production profile to prevent accidental activation.
Added explicit mail server configuration for production environment.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added spring.mail.host, port, username, and password fields.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrated JHipster-specific configuration to the new jhipster.* namespace structure.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Moved http.cache, cache.ehcache, and mail.base-url under jhipster: prefix.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated Liquibase configuration to use the new spring.liquibase.contexts property.
Ensured Thymeleaf template caching is enabled for production performance.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Update async task execution configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` namespace.
Move mail configuration from custom root namespace to standard Spring Boot `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `mail.host` with `spring.mail.host` (implied by structure change, though specific mail props moved to jhipster section in this diff, the structure implies standardization).

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace legacy custom OAuth2 configuration with Spring Security 5.x OAuth2 Client properties.
Update API documentation configuration to align with newer Swagger/SpringDoc conventions used in JHipster.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `swagger.title` with `jhipster.api-docs.title` and updated property keys like `termsOfServiceUrl` to `terms-of-service-url`.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot 2.x JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
Configure Micrometer metrics export and health probes for Spring Boot 2.x.
